name: live-consultant
description: Niche-specific business consulting, direct-response marketing, sales, funnels, Meta ads, operations, decisions, and evidence-gated learning.

interface.longDescription: Infer the exact buyer, niche, geography, channel, business model, and stage before researching and advising. Diagnose bottlenecks, create bold direct-response offers, design funnels and Meta experiments, solve sales and operations problems, and compound from corrections through private, evidence-gated project learning.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose the real bottleneck in my business.
Research my exact niche before recommending the strongest move.
Create three bold direct-response offers for this audience.
